items.title: Build Fully Onchain Perps on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of fully on-chain perpetual contracts on Solana could enhance trading efficiency and liquidity, attracting more users to the ecosystem.

items.title: Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
items.whyYouShouldCare: Kalshi's interest in perpetual futures for Solana signals growing institutional interest, which may increase market depth and trading volume for SOL.

items.title: Veda brings the vault stack behind Kraken DeFi Earn to Privy’s 2,000-plus developer teams
items.whyYouShouldCare: Veda's integration with Privy could streamline DeFi processes for developers on Solana, potentially boosting ecosystem innovation and user engagement.
